mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.title, s.description, s.owner_id, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.location, s.is_all_day, s.visibility, s.color, s.created_at, s.updated_at, u.name AS owner_name FROM gw_schedules s JOIN itsm_users u ON s.owner_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_schedules (title, description, owner_id, start_time, end_time, location, is_all_day, visibility, color) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{ownerId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{isAllDay}, #{visibility}, #{color})
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_schedules SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location}, is_all_day = #{isAllDay}, visibility = #{visibility}, color = #{color}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_schedule_attendees (schedule_id, user_id) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (schedule_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM gw_schedule_attendees WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
SELECT id, name, capacity, location, description, created_at FROM gw_meeting_rooms ORDER BY id

SELECT rb.id, rb.room_id, rb.schedule_id, rb.booked_by, rb.start_time, rb.end_time, rb.purpose, rb.created_at, u.name AS booked_by_name, mr.name AS room_name FROM gw_room_bookings rb JOIN itsm_users u ON rb.booked_by = u.id JOIN gw_meeting_rooms mr ON rb.room_id = mr.id WHERE rb.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_room_bookings (room_id, schedule_id, booked_by, start_time, end_time, purpose) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{scheduleId}, #{bookedBy}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{purpose})
